step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the conclusion that gutta-percha (option D) has radiolucency closest to dentin. One additional reason is that gutta-percha is commonly used as a root canal filling material, where its ability to match dentin’s radiolucency helps in identifying proper placement on X-rays. This practical application reinforces its similarity to natural tooth structures.
raw_response:
I agree with the conclusion that gutta-percha (option D) has radiolucency closest to dentin. One additional reason is that gutta-percha is commonly used as a root canal filling material, where its ability to match dentin’s radiolucency helps in identifying proper placement on X-rays. This practical application reinforces its similarity to natural tooth structures.  
Answer: D
